title: polystichum munitum subsp. nudatum
intro: Polystichum munitum subsp. nudatum, also known as Western Sword Fern, is a subspecies of fern native to the Pacific Northwest region of North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties that may help to soothe and heal wounds, reduce fever, and calm digestive issues. The health benefits of Western Sword Fern may include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory health, and supporting immune function, making it a valued herb in herbal medicine. Western Sword Fern can be prepared for medicinal use through teas, infusions, and tinctures, or used topically as a poultice or salve to apply directly to affected areas.
